offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, disorganized financial records cause late tax filings. We provide a tax preparation assistant instead of manual record-keeping and tax filing.
problem: Difficulty in organizing financial records and filing tax returns on time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on financial tools
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Share resources in Etsy seller groups
try_it: Let users try record organization and tax reminders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing records
